name: Medical Emergency Nanite Dose (MEND)
desc: A disposable autoinjector filled with medical nanites that rapidly repair injuries.

name: Rapid-Acting Genetically Engineered Epinephrine (RAGE)
desc: A combat stimulant that temporarily increases melee damage and movement speed, followed by a period of reduced movement speed.

name: Automated Intravenous Re-oxygenator (AIR)
desc: A disposable autoinjector that rapidly replenishes the user's oxygen supply.

name: frag grenade
desc: A single-use fragmentation grenade with a small, destructive blast radius.

name: EMP grenade
desc: A single-use electromagnetic grenade with a wide blast radius.

name: thermal grenade
desc: A single-use incendiary grenade that leaves a short-lived thermal hazard.
